security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: http://tauri.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.anthropic.com; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';

bundle.longDescription: Ambient AI scribe for independent behavioral health and psychiatry practices. Listens to patient encounters, generates structured clinical notes, and requires physician sign-off before finalization. Audio stays on your device.
bundle.shortDescription: Privacy-first AI scribe for behavioral health
